data.text: I’ll use the HELIX/DDx execution context rules for this bead, then inspect the app’s test and screenshot setup before making changes.
The repository has a broader DDx CLI plus a website/app area. I’m checking the package scripts, FEAT-008 spec, and current git state so the a11y/screenshot work stays scoped.

There are existing unrelated dirty symlink changes under `.agents` and `.claude`; I’ll leave those alone. The frontend already has dedicated a11y and screenshot specs, and the hard-coded color scan is pointing at document-rendering CSS plus two persona scrollbar rules.
The 12 requested baselines for the six a11y routes are present, along with newer project route baselines. Next I’m running the named a11y gate to get the actual axe output before changing anything.
The a11y script is present but dependencies are not installed in this worktree (`playwright` is missing). I’m installing the frontend dependencies in place, then I’ll rerun the same command.

Axe is already green across all 13 tests, including the 6 routes in both modes. I’m still making the requested drift cleanup: the remaining real hex colors are in the rendered-document CSS, so I’m converting those to semantic document tokens.

I’m going to keep the rendered markdown CSS where it is, but route every color through `--doc-*` tokens in `app.css`. That satisfies the “semantic” requirement without changing the markup or the visual hierarchy.
The real hex scan now returns no matches under `src/` after filtering Svelte `{#each}` syntax. I’m running the frontend checks and then the a11y gate again with the tokenized document styles.

The named a11y gate is still green after the token cleanup. I’m running the screenshot spec as the drift check, then I’ll reset the generated `build/index.html` because Playwright’s build step rewrites that ignored output wrapper.

Verification is complete: a11y passed, screenshot drift passed, the source hex scan is clean, and the 12 required light/dark baselines are tracked. I’m staging only the two intentional source files and committing the bead.

Implemented and committed `d95f8e92 fix: tokenise document markdown colors [ddx-250b570f]`.

Verified:
- `bun run check` passed with existing warnings only.
- `bun run test:a11y` passed: 13/13, including all 6 routes in light and dark.
- `bunx playwright test e2e/screenshots.spec.ts` passed: 20/20.
- No hard-coded hex colors remain under `cli/internal/server/frontend/src`.
- The required 12 light/dark screenshot baselines are tracked.

Unrelated pre-existing `.agents` / `.claude` dirty files were left untouched.
